__rationale__: Triggering fixture for MR-56: disulfide-aware host selection. Construct expresses a cargo ORF with 4 predicted disulfide bonds (e.g., scFv with conserved Cys pairs in VL + VH framework) in a reducing-cytoplasm host (BL21(DE3) standard). Expected eventual outcome (Phase 5/6): SOFT warning recommending Origami(DE3) / Origami B(DE3) / SHuffle T7; v0.2 stub returns INFO.

construct.notes: T-414 fixture asserts rule-registry coverage for MR-56. Phase 5/6 replaces stub semantics with executable predicate expectations (disulfide count vs host.disulfide_environment.cytoplasm_state cross-check).
